description: When building modern web or mobile applications, it’s often important to send and receive data in real time like getting new chat messages, notifications, or live updates.
title: Real Time Communication Methods

description: Learn the difference between forward and reverse proxies, their use cases, and how they protect clients and servers. Explore load balancing strategies and how they help distribute traffic efficiently across multiple servers, improving performance and security for websites and web applications.
title: Proxies and Load Balancers Enhance Web Performance and Security

description: Caching is the hidden engine behind fast, responsive systems. This guide breaks down core caching concepts from hits and misses to eviction policies and write strategies—along with tools like Redis, Memcached, and CDNs that power real-world performance at scale.
title: Speeding Up Systems With Smart Storage
